events.name: Brand Protection & Anti-Counterfeiting Executive Summit
events.description: The Brand Protection & Anti-Counterfeiting Executive Summit is a premier event dedicated to addressing the challenges and opportunities in safeguarding brands within a global market. This summit brings together leaders in brand protection and anti-counterfeiting to share insights and strategies for navigating the complexities of brand integrity in an increasingly digital and counterfeit-prone environment. With the evolution of technology and innovative methods, participants will gain valuable knowledge on how to better defend their businesses and brands. The event promises a comprehensive and engaging one-day experience held in New York, United States.

events.name: CISO New York
events.description: CISO New York is a premier gathering of cybersecurity leaders and professionals, scheduled to take place on July 23, 2026, in the vibrant city of New York. This one-day event offers an unparalleled opportunity for Chief Information Security Officers and security executives to engage in insightful discussions, share best practices, and explore the latest trends in information security. Attendees can expect a dynamic agenda featuring keynote speakers, panel discussions, and networking sessions designed to foster collaboration and innovation in the cybersecurity landscape.

This premier event brings together thought leaders, designers, and innovators from the fields of experiential graphic design and technology. Participants will engage in insightful discussions, workshops, and networking opportunities that explore the intersection of design and technology. Attendees can look forward to exploring cutting-edge trends, sharing best practices, and discovering new tools that enhance the user experience in various environments.

enriched_details.about: Followers Exhibitors Speakers Reviews Deals Interested Masters AI x TechnoCat Excited about the event? Spread the word and invite your network! Share Masters AI x TechnoCat is an innovative event held at the New York City Hall, designed specifically for those in the legal technology space who are seeking substantive discussions rather than the typical polished panels and vague predictions. This event is targeted towards practitioners, builders, operators, and industry leaders who ... Read More are eager to engage in honest discussions about the impact of artificial intelligence on the legal field. Attendees can expect a format that includes working sessions, live debates, and practical insights focused on the future of AI in legal contexts. This event stands out by emphasizing real conversations and actionable knowledge, making it ideal for individuals tired of superficial conversations about AI. It is particularly suitable for those working at service or software providers in the legal sector. Participants will have the chance to connect with peers and experts, enhancing their understanding of current trends and innovations in the intersection of AI and legal practices. Overall, Masters AI x TechnoCat promises to deliver a rich experience for those looking to deepen their expertise and network within the industry.

events.name: LexTalk World
events.description: LexTalk World is set to take place at the prestigious AMA Conference Center in New York City from July 23 to July 24, 2026. This dynamic event will gather industry leaders, innovators, and legal professionals from around the globe to engage in insightful discussions and share cutting-edge developments in the legal landscape. Attendees will have the opportunity to participate in a variety of workshops, panel discussions, and networking sessions, all designed to foster collaboration and inspire forward-thinking solutions.

faqs.answer: There are approx 105 speakers participating in this event. To get the list of speakers, please visit our website or to get the list on mail, register at the link .
